meaning: 普列文[保加利亚北部城市]
examples: A former trolley-bus driver under communism, he started with one cow in 1991 and now has 230, making him one of the biggest farmers in his district, near Pleven.
Morocco edged out Angola 1-0 at the Rene Pleven Stadium while on the other side of Cotonou, Egypt easily beat Lesotho 4-1 at the Friendship Stadium.
